name: @luminarylabs/nexusrealtime-experiments
description: NexusRealtime browser experiments composed from kits.

scripts.generate: npm run generate:application-routes && npm run generate:gallery-data
scripts.check: npm run generate && npm run check:control-math && node scripts/run-checks.mjs
scripts.check:deploy: npm run generate && npm run check:control-math && node scripts/run-checks.mjs --deploy
